cards.name: Convoy Leader
cards.flavor: Safety in numbers, profit in punctuality.

cards.name: Corsair Queen
cards.flavor: The void bows to no law but hers.

cards.name: Ensign Hale
cards.flavor: Freshly commissioned and eager to prove it.

cards.name: Ghost Commodore
cards.flavor: They never see the blade that cuts deepest.

cards.name: Iron Admiral
cards.flavor: Fleets break against her formations like waves on steel.

cards.name: Patrol Commander
cards.flavor: Every sector deserves a watchful eye.

cards.name: Privateer
cards.flavor: A letter of marque and a fast ship.

cards.name: Scout Master
cards.flavor: Know the void before the void knows you.

cards.name: Shield Warden
cards.flavor: Nothing gets through on my watch.

cards.name: Tactical Officer
cards.flavor: Precision wins battles. Instinct wins wars.

cards.name: The Sovereign
cards.flavor: Where she commands, stars kneel.

cards.name: Void Marshal
cards.flavor: Rank means nothing. Results mean everything.

cards.name: War Sage
cards.flavor: Every battle is a lesson.

cards.name: Antimatter Plant
cards.flavor: The annihilation of matter feeds the empire.

cards.name: Bio Dome
cards.flavor: A garden among the stars.

cards.name: Colony Hub
cards.flavor: Where settlers first call home.

cards.name: Dark Matter Lab
cards.flavor: Probing the invisible scaffolding of reality.

cards.name: Data Archive
cards.flavor: Every discovery preserved for eternity.

cards.name: Dyson Collector
cards.special: Energy output scales with star luminosity.
cards.flavor: To harness a star is to hold infinity.

cards.name: Fusion Reactor
cards.flavor: Atoms split, power flows.

cards.name: Hydroponics Bay
cards.flavor: Life finds a way, even in the void.

cards.name: Megastructure Scaffold
cards.flavor: The skeleton of something immense takes shape.

cards.name: Mining Outpost
cards.flavor: Deep core extractors never rest.

cards.name: Nanite Assembler
cards.flavor: Molecule by molecule, a world remade.

cards.name: Orbital Farm Ring
cards.flavor: Endless fields circling the world below.

cards.name: Ore Refinery
cards.flavor: Raw stone becomes refined wealth.

cards.name: Quantum Computer
cards.flavor: Processing power beyond mortal comprehension.

cards.name: Research Lab
cards.flavor: Knowledge is the ultimate resource.

cards.name: Shield Generator
cards.flavor: An invisible dome of safety.

cards.name: Solar Array
cards.flavor: Harnessing the light of distant suns.

cards.name: Spaceport
cards.flavor: The gateway between ground and sky.

cards.name: Stellar Foundry
cards.flavor: Forged in the heat of captured stars.

cards.name: Terraform Engine
cards.flavor: Rewriting the laws of a world.

cards.name: Chief Engineer
cards.flavor: If it's broken, she'll fix it.

cards.name: Colony Overseer
cards.flavor: Keeping the gears turning.

cards.name: Eternal Chancellor
cards.flavor: Under her rule, empires flourish.

cards.name: Frontier Preacher
cards.flavor: Faith holds where bulkheads fail.

cards.name: Galactic Diplomat
cards.flavor: Peace is not weakness. It is the hardest victory.

cards.name: Labor Organizer
cards.flavor: Together we build.

cards.name: Propaganda Minister
cards.flavor: The truth is whatever keeps them working.

cards.name: Research Director
cards.flavor: Funding the questions no one else asks.

cards.name: Spymaster
cards.flavor: Information is the only currency that never devalues.

cards.name: Supply Coordinator
cards.flavor: Every crate accounted for.

cards.name: Trade Magnate
cards.flavor: Credits are just a way of keeping score.

cards.name: Visionary Architect
cards.flavor: She sees the city that will stand in a thousand years.

cards.name: War Marshal
cards.flavor: Strategy wins battles. Logistics wins wars.

cards.name: Arid Waste
cards.flavor: Sun-blasted plains of cracked earth.

cards.name: Barren Rock
cards.flavor: Nothing grows here, but the ground is rich.

cards.name: Crystalline World
cards.flavor: The surface shines in impossible colors.

cards.name: Desert Oasis
cards.flavor: Life clings to scattered water sources.

cards.name: Frozen Moon
cards.flavor: Silent, cold, and full of secrets.

cards.name: Gaia World
cards.flavor: As if the planet was made for us.

cards.name: Gas Giant
cards.flavor: A world of storms with no ground to stand on.

cards.name: Jungle World
cards.flavor: Green devours everything. Even the sky.

cards.name: Ocean World
cards.flavor: Endless waves hide endless depth.

cards.name: Precursor Homeworld
cards.flavor: They were here long before us. Where did they go?

cards.name: Ring World Fragment
cards.flavor: A broken circle that still dwarfs most worlds.

cards.name: Temperate World
cards.flavor: A gentle world with room to breathe.

cards.name: Tidally Locked World
cards.flavor: One face burns, the other freezes.

cards.name: Volcanic World
cards.flavor: The ground never stops shaking.

cards.name: Assault Corvette
cards.flavor: Close fast, hit hard, don't stop.

cards.name: Battlecruiser
cards.flavor: A fortress that sails the void.

cards.name: Colony Ship
cards.flavor: Slow, lightly armed, indispensable. Carries the seed of a new world.

cards.name: Destroyer
cards.flavor: Purpose-built for one thing: war.

cards.name: Dreadnought
cards.flavor: When it appears, wars end.

cards.name: Fleet Carrier
cards.flavor: Its squadrons swarm like angry stars.

cards.name: Gunboat
cards.flavor: More gun than ship.

cards.name: Heavy Cruiser
cards.flavor: The iron fist of the fleet.

cards.name: Missile Corvette
cards.flavor: One shot, one kill.

cards.name: Missile Frigate
cards.flavor: Death delivered from a safe distance.

cards.name: Patrol Frigate
cards.flavor: Keeping the spacelanes safe.

cards.name: Picket Ship
cards.flavor: The fleet's first line of defense.

cards.name: Scout Corvette
cards.flavor: First to see, last to be seen.

cards.name: Sensor Pinnace
cards.flavor: Watching, always watching.

cards.name: Shield Frigate
cards.flavor: Stand behind me.

cards.name: Stealth Interceptor
cards.flavor: A whisper in the dark between stars.

cards.name: Titan
cards.flavor: A mobile world, bristling with purpose.

cards.name: Torpedo Cruiser
cards.flavor: Salvos that darken the stars.

cards.name: Binary System
cards.flavor: Two hearts, one system.

cards.name: Blue Supergiant
cards.flavor: Burning bright, burning fast.

cards.name: Brown Dwarf
cards.flavor: Not quite a star, not quite nothing.

cards.name: Magnetar
cards.flavor: Space itself screams near its poles.

cards.name: Neutron Star
cards.flavor: A teaspoon weighs a billion tons.

cards.name: Orange Giant
cards.flavor: Swollen with age, rich with possibility.

cards.name: Primordial Quasar Remnant
cards.special: A relic of creation, still burning with the first light.
cards.flavor: Worlds from a younger universe.

cards.name: Pulsar
cards.special: A lighthouse spinning in the dark.
cards.flavor: Signals echo across systems.

cards.name: Red Dwarf
cards.flavor: Small, steady, eternal.

cards.name: Trinary System
cards.flavor: Three suns dance an eternal waltz.

cards.name: White Dwarf
cards.flavor: The ember of a once-great fire.

cards.name: Yellow Main Sequence
cards.flavor: The kind of star that breeds life.
